document: multi-document corpus (6 en_* school policy documents)

queries.note: Football/equipment during breaks — spans code-of-conduct and family manual
queries.question: Can my son bring a football to the school and play during breaks?

queries.note: Photography on trips — spans technology policy and trips/outings policy
queries.question: What are the rules about taking photos of students during school trips?

queries.note: Injury on a trip — spans trips/outings and health & safety
queries.question: What should happen if a student is injured during a school trip?

queries.note: Mobile phones during sport — spans technology and code of conduct
queries.question: Are students allowed to use mobile phones during PE lessons?

queries.note: Abuse disclosure — should route to child protection only
queries.question: What is the correct procedure when a student discloses abuse to a teacher?

queries.note: Fire drill — should route to health & safety only
queries.question: What should happen after a fire drill and who is responsible?

queries.note: Social media and school — spans technology policy and code of conduct
queries.question: What is the school's position on students posting about school on social media?
